live_migration_support_notes: Use RDB/AOF seed plus PSYNC replication stream ordered by replication offset; MONITOR/keyspace notifications are diagnostics only.
initial_snapshot_or_seed: RDB snapshot or AOF replay at replication offset
delta_feed_or_change_capture: PSYNC/replication stream ordered by replication offset; AOF tail as fallback evidence
proxy_method: RESP proxy with keyspace/database-number readiness routing
alternate_or_fallback: MONITOR/keyspace notifications are diagnostics only and cannot prove live cutover without command proxy observation
required_cutover_barrier: replica offset acknowledged; selected DB/keyspace scan compare clean; expirations/streams/transactions/Lua effects verified
parser_worker_scope: parse reference migration commands/wire/API messages; classify route; render reference diagnostics; no execution/finality authority
sbup_role_a_scope: trusted Role A bridge/proxy/source connector after engine admission; normalizes source events to ReferenceLiveIngestEventRecord; invokes admitted SBLR/internal procedures only
engine_mga_rule: destination ScratchBird MGA owns target commit visibility rollback recovery cutover evidence; reference feed tokens are evidence only
proof_tests: project/tests reference regression original baseline emulation steady-state active live-migration proxy mirror crash-restart idempotent replay rollback cutover performance and support bundle proofs
